description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-list`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-list/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 28 defects — 4 P0, 11 P1, 11 P2, 2 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] Description list (`<dl>`) type is missing
- [ ] [P0] ARIA listbox pattern is missing required keyboard navigation
- [ ] [P0] ARIA ownership does not cross Shadow DOM boundaries
- [ ] [P0] `:host-context()` is deprecated and unsupported in Firefox

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-list
